vocab.meaning: làm ai đó cực kỳ ấn tượng hoặc ngạc nhiên
vocab.example: The panoramic view from the top of the mountain truly knocked my socks off; I had never seen anything like it.

vocab.meaning: một làn gió mới (điều gì đó mới mẻ, dễ chịu)
vocab.example: After spending weeks in the polluted city, the sight of the open green fields was a real breath of fresh air.

vocab.meaning: khiến ai đó phải dừng lại ngay lập tức (vì quá kinh ngạc)
vocab.example: The sheer scale of the canyon was enough to stop me in my tracks as I stepped out of the car.

vocab.meaning: tuyệt vời, không tưởng (như ở thế giới khác)
vocab.example: The starry sky in the remote desert was out of this world; it felt like I could touch the Milky Way.

vocab.meaning: thưởng ngoạn/chiêm ngưỡng một cách say mê
vocab.example: We sat on the balcony for hours, feasting our eyes on the sun setting behind the ancient pagodas.
Even now, years later, I can still see that crystal-clear lake perfectly in my mind's eye.
The first time I saw the limestone karsts in Ha Long Bay, it completely took my breath away.
We found this stunning waterfall in the middle of nowhere, far away from any tourist trails.

vocab.meaning: không thốt nên lời (vì quá ấn tượng)
vocab.example: When the mist cleared and revealed the valley below, I was simply lost for words.

vocab.word: a picture is worth a thousand words
vocab.ipa: /ə ˈpɪktʃə(r) ɪz wɜːθ ə ˈθaʊznd wɜːdz/
vocab.meaning: một bức tranh có giá trị hơn ngàn lời nói (diễn tả vẻ đẹp khó tả)
vocab.example: I tried to describe the scenery to my friends, but a picture is worth a thousand words—it was just too beautiful for prose.
